nodes.name: 栗麻雀
nodes.summary: 栗麻雀（Passer eminibey）是麻雀属的一种鸟类。它是雀科最小的一种鸟，体长仅11厘米（4.3英寸）。雄鸟的繁殖羽呈栗色，但雌鸟和幼鸟的羽毛基本呈灰色。和同属的近亲阿拉伯金麻雀和苏丹金麻雀一样，栗麻雀主要生活于干旱地区。非洲东部从苏丹的達爾富爾到坦桑尼亚都有其踪迹。它们有时候会和其他一些鸟类混在一起飞行。 形態 栗麻雀是雀科最小的一种鸟，體長在11厘米（4.3英寸）左右。其體重在12—17克（0.42—0.60盎司）之間，雄鳥翼展6.0—6.5厘米（2.4—2.6英寸），雌鳥5.7—6.0厘米（2.2—2.4英寸）。 参考文献 外部链接 Chestnut sparrow at the Internet Bird Collection （页面存档备份，存于互联网档案馆） Chestnut sparrow at Tanzaniabirds.net （页面存档备份，存于互联网档案馆）

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found mostly in dry savanna and in fields and villages, but unlike its relations the golden sparrows, it is sometimes found in swamps of papyrus (certain Cyperus spp.). Its population has not been quantified, but it appears to be common across a very large range and it is assessed by the IUCN Red List as Least Concern for global extinction

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Ranging through the east of Africa from Darfur in Sudan to Tanzania, it is found in dry savanna, papyrus swamps, and near human habitation
